message:
fix(huggingface): use strip_suffix instead of string replace for whoami URL

The previous code used .replace("/api", "") which is substring-based and
could incorrectly mutate URLs containing "/api" in other positions (e.g.,
"https://api-inference.huggingface.co/api-v2"). Changed to
strip_suffix("/api") which only removes the exact trailing path segment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
